releaseNotes:
v0.21 — multi-device sync now runs over a hosted backend instead of a shared cloud folder. Set up via a 6-character code that you share between devices (no folder picker). New "Import from old sync folder" button in Settings moves your existing pharmacy history into the new backend in one shot. Sync setup is faster and works the same way on Android, Windows, iOS, and Mac.

Also new in v0.21: read-only-mode safety net for license states (won't trigger for active customers). Existing scan flows, edit dialogs, manual entry, and pull mode are unchanged.
